# World Gal-Game Engine

> A pygame Gal-Game **engine** (not a game). Games are independent *packs* (a
> directory with a `content/` YAML tree). The engine carries zero game-specific
> logic — themes are added via plugins, never core edits. AI is a first-class
> developer: every play / inspect / reason / edit / verify path is headless,
> deterministic, and machine-readable.

Console script: `world-gal-game` (source checkout: `uv run python -m
world_gal_game.cli <subcommand>`). Pack args take a name (`demo_pack`) or path.
Pass `--seed N` for determinism. For pip-installed use without a repo checkout,
regenerate onboarding from code: `world-gal-game agent-guide`,
`world-gal-game docs export <dir>`, `world-gal-game capabilities --schema`.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): agent-neutral onboarding — interfaces, principles, key files
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): the same, with Claude Code specifics
- [ROADMAP.md](ROADMAP.md): strategy and phase roadmap
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): documentation index

## Core concepts

- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): module layering, data flow, templates
- [docs/pack-format.md](docs/pack-format.md): pack directory + YAML schema
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md): write your first pack
- [docs/tutorial-build-a-game.md](docs/tutorial-build-a-game.md): step-by-step tutorial

## AI-native contract (verbs, schema, determinism)

- [docs/ai-native-contract.md](docs/ai-native-contract.md): typed effect/condition args, run_script ops, trace, diff, seed
- [docs/headless.md](docs/headless.md): HeadlessSession — play / inspect / apply / check / snapshot / restore
- [docs/ai-debug.md](docs/ai-debug.md): GameDriver — pixel-level UI debugging
- [docs/ai-developer-guide.md](docs/ai-developer-guide.md): full AI developer guide

## AI-native world model (reasoning)

- [docs/ai-native-world-model.md](docs/ai-native-world-model.md): variables, dataflow, planner, coverage, session, rollback
- [docs/session-protocol.md](docs/session-protocol.md): warm NDJSON control session — line framing, message shapes, batch atomicity, errors

## Capability endpoints (machine-readable, one call each)

- `capabilities --pack <pack> [--schema]`: effect/condition/hook/... kinds + JSON-Schema bundle
- `variables <pack> [--check]`: typed declared narrative state
- `inspect-pack <pack> [--dataflow | --references <sym>]`: structure, reachability, dead-ends, graph, writers/readers
- `context <pack>`: ONE JSON — variables + reachability + scene graph + dataflow digest + coverage totals + gaps
- `impact <pack> --symbol <id>`: change pre-flight — readers, at-risk endings/scenes, planner baseline
- `plan --pack <pack> --goal '<json>'`: goal-directed BFS → replayable op path
- `coverage <pack> --script <s>`: scene/line/choice/ending coverage
- `session --pack <pack>`: warm NDJSON op stream (faster than process-spawn / RPC)
- `docs export <dir|->`: self-contained onboarding bundle (works pip-installed)

## Authoring & extension

- [docs/scenes.md](docs/scenes.md), [docs/locations.md](docs/locations.md), [docs/characters.md](docs/characters.md): content model
- [docs/effects-reference.md](docs/effects-reference.md), [docs/conditions-reference.md](docs/conditions-reference.md): verb references
- [docs/items.md](docs/items.md), [docs/resources.md](docs/resources.md), [docs/shops.md](docs/shops.md), [docs/achievements.md](docs/achievements.md), [docs/affection.md](docs/affection.md), [docs/quests.md](docs/quests.md): subsystems
- [docs/plugins.md](docs/plugins.md): nine extension categories, 16 lifecycle hooks
- [docs/cookbook.md](docs/cookbook.md): common patterns

## Distribution & presentation

- [docs/distribution.md](docs/distribution.md), [docs/distribution-web.md](docs/distribution-web.md), [docs/distribution-mobile.md](docs/distribution-mobile.md), [docs/distribution-steam.md](docs/distribution-steam.md)
- [docs/presentation-and-extras.md](docs/presentation-and-extras.md), [docs/theme-and-locale.md](docs/theme-and-locale.md), [docs/galgame-maturity.md](docs/galgame-maturity.md)

## Key source files

- `world_gal_game/core/game_state.py`: central `apply` / `evaluate` dispatch
- `world_gal_game/content_loader.py`: pack loading entry point
- `world_gal_game/dev/capability_manifest.py`: machine-readable capability list
- `world_gal_game/dev/dataflow.py`: writers/readers + conditioned scene edges
- `world_gal_game/dev/session_server.py`: warm NDJSON session
- `world_gal_game/dev/planner.py`: goal-directed BFS
- `world_gal_game/dev/coverage.py`: coverage tracker
- `world_gal_game/dev/agent_endpoints.py`: context + impact aggregate endpoints
- `world_gal_game/dev/agent_bundle.py`: agent-guide + docs-export onboarding bundle
